title: Software Engineer
description:
**Job Description**
 Works in the area of Software Engineering, which encompasses the development, maintenance and optimization of software solutions/applications.
   

  

* Applies scientific methods to analyse and solve software engineering problems.
* He/she is responsible for the development and application of software engineering practice and knowledge, in research, design, development and maintenance.
* His/her work requires the exercise of original thought and judgement and the ability to supervise the technical and administrative work of other software engineers.
* The software engineer builds skills and expertise of his/her software engineering discipline to reach standard software engineer skills expectations for the applicable role, as defined in Professional Communities.
* The software engineer collaborates and acts as team player with other software engineers and stakeholders.


 Works in the area of Software Engineering, which encompasses the development, maintenance and optimization of software solutions/applications.1\\. Applies scientific methods to analyse and solve software engineering problems.2\\. He/she is responsible for the development and application of software engineering practice and knowledge, in research, design, development and maintenance.3\\. His/her work requires the exercise of original thought and judgement and the ability to supervise the technical and administrative work of other software engineers.4\\. The software engineer builds skills and expertise of his/her software engineering discipline to reach standard software engineer skills expectations for the applicable role, as defined in Professional Communities.5\\. The software engineer collaborates and acts as team player with other software engineers and stakeholders.
   

  

**Job Description \\- Grade Specific**
 Has more than a year of relevant work experience. Solid understanding of programming concepts, software design and software development principles. Consistently works to direction with minimal supervision, producing accurate and reliable results. Individuals are expected to be able to work on a range of tasks and problems, demonstrating their ability to apply their skills and knowledge. Organises own time to deliver against tasks set by others with a mid term horizon. Works co\\-operatively with others to achieve team goals and has a direct and positive impact on project performance and make decisions based on their understanding of the situation, not just the rules.

title: Sr Software Engineer
description:
**About The Role**
 Earner Org represents the supply side of the marketplace, serving the needs of drivers and couriers (collectively called Earners \\- 8M\\+ globally and increasing everyday) and empowering them to improve their earnings and have a delightful experience on Uber as the largest Gig Platform globally.
   

  

 Earner India engineering is responsible for building products and solutions that power this experience, through their onboarding and operational journey. These include Earner's onboarding and compliance, online experience on the Earner App, progression, loyalty constructs and Metrics/Performance tracking
   

  

 As a software engineer \\- Backend in Earner, you will be working on one of these sub\\-areas, building products \\& services, contributing in engineering excellence initiatives for those assets and maintaining operational health of the underlying systems/services in perfect health, ensuring high availability and reliability. You will be taking guidance from Sr Staff \\& Staff Engs and also guiding SE\\-1 and SE\\-2s. You will collaborate with you peer partner engineers in sister teams and cross\\-functional stakeholders on delivering on your OKRs.
   

  

**What The Candidate Will Need / Bonus Points**
 \\-\\-\\-\\- What the Candidate Will Do \\-\\-\\-\\-
   

  

* Develop and test software applications using Uber's technology stack
* You'll be very close to business concerns, working alongside Product Managers, Designers, Data Scientists and Operations team, to understand what's most important, and translating that to systems, designs, and code that best solves for today, as well as plans for tomorrow
* You will build user\\-facing products \\- the work you do will impact Earners. You will be responsible for the delivery of high quality products with fast iterations.


**Basic Qualifications**
* Grit, drive and a deep feeling of ownership.
* Minimum 6\\+ years hands on experience in developing web/full stack systems and micro services
* Good understanding of databases, messaging and system design for resiliency and reliability
* Experience analysing a feature in production using analytics and experiments
* Experience collaborating on projects and working efficiently as part of a team
* Having a go\\-getter attitude


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Good problem solving and communication skills
* Experience working with geographically distributes teams

title: Specialist Software Engineer(.Net Core)
description:
Reference 260004ND
   

  

**Responsibilities**
**Role Description \\-**
 We are looking for a Lead Software engineer with 8 plus years of experience in Spark/Scala for a BigData Project.
   

  

 Responsible for setting a clear vision and direction, ensuring on time delivery .
   

  

 Responsible for designing, developing, and implementing solutions to process and analyse large data sets using Apache Spark.
   

  

 You will collaborate with data engineers, data scientists, and other stakeholders to ensure efficient data processing and integration.
   

  

 Problem\\-solving and conflict resolution abilities is a key for the role
   

  

**Required**
**Profile required**
**Job Responsibilities \\-**
* Lead the design and impact analysis of all new features and enhancements.
* Lead all aspects of Software Development Lifecyle (SDLC) in\\-line with Agile and IT craftsmanship principles.
* Identify methods to sustain and improve various craftsmanship areas.
* Lead the timely delivery of assigned artifacts with defined quality parameters.
* Perform code review and ensure the quality of code, constantly.
* Automate manual tasks of application maintenance and support to improve efficiency.
* Lead initiatives of application modernization.
* Ensure constant review and update of Agile and DevOps practices.
* Constantly learn new/emerging technologies and mentor teams.
* Monitor the overall production processes such as daily checks, open tickets and aging of issues.
* Collaborate with customers, partners, development teams, chapter and feature teams.
* Co\\-ordinate with development team and implement audit recommendations.
* Lead DevOps chapters and Guilds.
* Guide the team on data processing solutions and building data pipelines.
* Identify new areas of technology and use cases for data validation and implementation.


**SKILLS REQUIRED:**
 Spark, Scala, Python, HDFS, Hive, Scheduler ( Ozzie, Airflow),Kafka
   

  

**Why join us**
 We are committed to creating a diverse environment and are proud to be an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, disability, age, or veteran status”
   

  

**Business insight**
 At Société Générale, we are convinced that people are drivers of change, and that the world of tomorrow will be shaped by all their initiatives, from the smallest to the most ambitious. Whether you’re joining us for a period of months, years or your entire career, together we can have a positive impact on the future. Creating, daring, innovating, and taking action are part of our DNA. If you too want to be directly involved, grow in a stimulating and caring environment, feel useful on a daily basis and develop or strengthen your expertise, you will feel right at home with us!
   

  

 Still hesitating?
   

  

 You should know that our employees can dedicate several days per year to solidarity actions during their working hours, including sponsoring people struggling with their orientation or professional integration, participating in the financial education of young apprentices, and sharing their skills with charities. There are many ways to get involved.
   

  

 We are committed to support accelerating our Group’s ESG strategy by implementing ESG principles in all our activities and policies. They are translated in our business activity (ESG assessment, reporting, project management or IT activities), our work environment and in our responsible practices for environment protection.

title: Software Consulting Engineer - Ai/ML and Agentic AIOps
description:
Meet the Team
   

  

 The CX organization is a team of exceptional technical leaders focused on delivering a premier customer experience through innovation, automation, and next\\-generation technologies. We help customers solve complex business challenges using AI\\-driven, network\\-centric solutions that accelerate transformation, operational excellence, and business outcomes. Our success is reflected in strong customer satisfaction, industry recognition, and a culture of continuous learning and innovation.
   

  

 Your Impact
   

  

 As an AI/ML Technical Leader, you will lead the design, development, and delivery of intelligent AI/ML solutions, automation platforms, and GenAI\\-powered applications for enterprise customers. You will work closely with customers, architects, and cross\\-functional teams to translate business requirements into scalable AI\\-driven architectures and operational solutions.
   

  

 This role offers the opportunity to work on cutting\\-edge technologies including Generative AI, Agentic AI frameworks, GPU\\-accelerated infrastructure, MLOps platforms, and cloud\\-native AI ecosystems while driving meaningful customer transformation initiatives.
   

  

* Lead the design, development, and deployment of scalable AI/ML and GenAI\\-powered solutions for enterprise environments.
* Build and manage AI/ML pipelines for model training, inference, observability, monitoring, and automation.
* Support presales engagements by translating customer business requirements into scalable AI/ML solution architectures.
* Develop AI agents, intelligent workflows, and LLM\\-powered applications to accelerate customer outcomes.
* Drive customer technology transformation initiatives while influencing AI/ML solution strategy, architecture, and delivery execution.


**Minimum Qualifications**
* BE/B.Tech/B.Sc. in Computer Science, Engineering, or equivalent with 8\\+ years of relevant industry experience.
* Strong hands\\-on experience in Python and AI/ML development frameworks.
* Experience with AI/ML ecosystems including PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit\\-learn, Hugging Face, LangChain, or LlamaIndex.
* Deep understanding of Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC), MLOps, CI/CD pipelines, and Agile methodologies.
* Experience designing and deploying AI infrastructure across cloud, GPU\\-accelerated, containerized, and distributed computing environments.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience with Generative AI, Agentic AI frameworks, and LLM\\-based application development.
* Expertise with Kubeflow, MLflow, Docker, Kubernetes, KServe, vLLM, and TensorRT\\-LLM.
* Knowledge of NVIDIA AI ecosystem, CUDA, GPU optimization, and distributed AI infrastructure.
* Strong problem\\-solving, debugging, communication, and technical mentoring skills.
* Exposure to AIOps, observability platforms, REST APIs, SQL/NoSQL databases, Linux/Unix environments, and networking concepts.


**Additional Responsibilities**
* Participate in services presales activities, SOW creation, solution scoping, and customer proposal discussions.
* Create Customer Requirements Documents, High\\-Level Designs (HLDs), and implementation plans.
* Provide technical leadership across cross\\-functional teams spanning AI architecture, operations, and delivery.
* Build customer simulations and lab environments to validate AI/ML solution performance and resolve technical issues.
* Deliver customer documentation, knowledge transfer sessions, and enablement programs for internal and external stakeholders.
* Mentor junior engineers and drive adoption of AI/ML engineering best practices across teams.
* Act as a focal point for complex customer issue resolution and ensure successful engagement delivery.


 Why Cisco?
   

  

 At Cisco, we’re revolutionizing how data and infrastructure connect and protect organizations in the AI era – and beyond. We’ve been innovating fearlessly for 40 years to create solutions that power how humans and technology work together across the physical and digital worlds. These solutions provide customers with unparalleled security, visibility, and insights across the entire digital footprint.
   

  

 Fueled by the depth and breadth of our technology, we experiment and create meaningful solutions. Add to that our worldwide network of doers and experts, and you’ll see that the opportunities to grow and build are limitless. We work as a team, collaborating with empathy to make really big things happen on a global scale. Because our solutions are everywhere, our impact is everywhere.
   

  

 We are Cisco, and our power starts with you.

title: Custom Software Engineer
description:
**Project Role :** 
 Custom Software Engineer
   

  

**Project Role Description :** 
 Develop custom software solutions to design, code, and enhance components across systems or applications. Use modern frameworks and agile practices to deliver scalable, high\\-performing solutions tailored to specific business needs.
   

  

**Must have skills :** 
 React.js
   

  

**Good to have skills :** 
 JavaScript
   

  

**Minimum 5 Year(s) Of Experience Is Required**
**Educational Qualification :** 
 15 years full time education
   

  

 Summary:
   

  

 As a Custom Software Engineer, you will design, build, and configure applications to meet business process and application requirements. Your typical day will involve collaborating with various teams to understand their needs, developing innovative solutions, and ensuring that the applications you create are user\\-friendly and efficient. You will also engage in problem\\-solving activities, providing support and guidance to your colleagues while continuously seeking ways to improve the software development process.
   

  

 Roles \\& Responsibilities:
   

  

* Expected to be an SME.
* Collaborate and manage the team to perform.
* Responsible for team decisions.
* Engage with multiple teams and contribute on key decisions.
* Provide solutions to problems for their immediate team and across multiple teams.
* Mentor junior team members to enhance their skills and knowledge.
* Continuously evaluate and implement best practices in software development.


 Professional \\& Technical Skills:
   

  

* Must To Have Skills: Proficiency in React.js.
* Good To Have Skills: Experience with JavaScript.
* Strong understanding of component\\-based architecture and state management.
* Familiarity with RESTful APIs and integration techniques.
* Experience with version control systems, particularly Git.
* Knowledge of testing frameworks and methodologies to ensure code quality.


 Additional Information:
   

  

* The candidate should have minimum 5 years of experience in React.js.
* This position is based at our Pune office.
* A 15 years full time education is required.

title: Custom Software Engineer
description:
**Project Role :** 
 Custom Software Engineer
   

  

**Project Role Description :** 
 Develop custom software solutions to design, code, and enhance components across systems or applications. Use modern frameworks and agile practices to deliver scalable, high\\-performing solutions tailored to specific business needs.
   

  

**Must have skills :** 
 BlueYonder Fulfillment
   

  

**Good to have skills :** 
 A\\&D Aftermarket
   

  

**Minimum 5 Year(s) Of Experience Is Required**
**Educational Qualification :** 
 15 years full time education
   

  

 Summary:
   

  

 As a Custom Software Engineer, a typical day involves creating tailored software solutions by designing, coding, and improving various components within systems or applications. The role requires working with contemporary development frameworks and following agile methodologies to ensure the delivery of scalable and efficient software that meets unique business requirements. Collaboration with different teams and continuous refinement of software elements to enhance performance and functionality are integral parts of the daily routine.
   

  

 Roles \\& Responsibilities:
   

  

* 6\\+ years of hands\\-on experience, as an architect or business consultant providing supply chain solutions for customers. Either a customer of BY/JDA/or other similar solution or as a consultant implementing i2/BY/JDA/or other similar supply chain planning solution for customers preferred
* Advanced degree in Supply Chain, Operations, Logistics or Operations Research preferred. A combination of Bachelor s degree and relevant industry experience may be considered in lieu of advanced degree.
* Understanding of multiple i2/ BY/JDA solutions (Demand, SCP/ESP, Fulfill, S\\&OP, IO) and configuration to better facilitate client business processes.
* Demonstrable experience with i2/BY/JDA planning solution or similar supply chain planning solution.
* Experience in demand \\& supply planning for Manufacturing \\&/Or Retail Industry segment.
* Relevant solutions consulting and implementation experience with other leading supply chain planning solutions such as O9, Kinaxis, Oracle, SAP, or leading ERP may be considered.
* Has working experience of AI/ ML algorithms. Working experience of R, python packages
* Understands Time series forecasting.
* Understanding of data base, snowflake, azure, saas technical platform, devops operations
* Strong business analysis skills, understanding and usage of statistical \\& machine learning algorithms, SCM concepts, awareness of tactical planning on overall supply chain required.
* Relevant industry certification from APICS will be a plus.
* Ability to drive discussions on both functional processes and technical concepts in a language that can be understood across a diverse audience and multiple levels within customer's/BY organization.
* Ability to develop and maintain strong, productive relationships with customers, partners, PD. PMG and consultants. Works with appropriate parties to ensure issues are resolved.
* Highly developed analytical and problem\\-solving skills.
* Ability to work independently, effectively and proactively.
* Passionate about working with new technologies, products and demonstrate the ability to learn quickly, have good interpersonal \\& communication skills – verbal \\& written.
* Retail Domain experience is mandatory


 Professional \\& Technical Skills:
   

  

* Must To Have Skills: Proficiency in BlueYonder Demand Planning.
* Good To Have Skills: Experience with A\\&D Aftermarket.
* Strong knowledge of software development lifecycle and agile methodologies.
* Ability to design and implement scalable software components tailored to business needs.
* Experience with modern programming frameworks and tools to build high\\-performing applications.
* Capability to troubleshoot and optimize software for improved efficiency and reliability.


 Additional Information:
   

  

* The candidate should have minimum 7\\.5 years of experience in BlueYonder Demand Planning.
* This position is based at our Chennai office.
* A 15 years full time education is required.
